name: Jefferies Financial Group Inc.
summary: PART I Introduction Jefferies Financial Group Inc. (Jefferies, we, us or our) is a U.S.-headquartered global investment banking and capital markets firm. Our largest subsidiary, Jefferies LLC, a U.S. broker- dealer, was founded in the U.S. in 1962 and our first international operating subsidiary, Jefferies International Limited, a U.K. broker-dealer, was established in the U.K. in 1986.
